response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development, experimentation, and technical leadership, but lacks direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: Proven ability to design and ship systemic solutions
Strong software-engineering fundamentals with production service experience
Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
No explicit mention of experience with telemetry and metrics infrastructure
No clear indication of experience with service reliability and distributed systems at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in AI-first systems
